intention: 通过努力学习，现在我能做到某事了
naturalChunk: By studying ___ hard, I can now ___
sentencePatterns: By studying ___ hard, I can now ___.
Through hard study, I've started to ___.
realLifeExamples: By studying English hard, I can now recognize key points in complex sentences.
By studying data structures hard, I can now solve most algorithm problems.
productionPrompts: 你怎么描述通过努力学习某件事，现在有了进步？用 By studying ___ hard, I can now 说出来。
